error_signature: loop ends before every item has been looped
title: Loop terminates prematurely in Salesforce integration
symptom: The workflow with Salesforce integration stops executing after 49 iterations instead of processing all 350 records. The execution ends with a success message, but not all items are looped through.
not_this_if: All nodes inside the loop produce output
root_cause: The loop in n8n may terminate early if one of the nodes inside the loop does not produce any output. This can happen if the node encounters an issue or if it is configured not to output data, causing the loop to stop processing further items.
fix_steps: Check the execution log to identify the last node executed
Investigate the input and output of that node
If the node is expected to produce output, go to its settings
Enable the 'Always output data' option to ensure it produces an empty output if no data is available
agent_instruction: Enable 'Always output data' in the node settings to prevent premature loop termination.
